content: If we frame the language learning definition of reflexion (as a vocabulary term for critical reflection in writing workshops) as a training scaffold for LLM self-reflection mechanisms, we can design better few-shot self-reflection prompts that ground abstract AI self-correction in the structured critical reflection routines humans use to revise their own writing. This creates a human-aligned self-reflection pipeline that leverages existing educational design rather than building LLM reflection frameworks entirely from machine learning research.
